Name: TSMC
Rationale: Irreplaceable AI chip foundry. NVIDIA/AMD/Apple all depend on TSMC for cutting-edge nodes. Arizona fab expansion reduces geopolitical discount. Core position when pullbacks to entry.

Name: Applied Materials
Rationale: Semiconductor equipment leader. Every new fab — TSMC, Samsung, Intel — buys AMAT tools. Direct leveraged bet on AI capex cycle without single-chip risk.

Name: Palantir
Rationale: AIP (AI Platform) is the real growth engine — Fortune 500 plugging data into LLM orchestration. Contrarian culture attracts top talent. Founder-led. Patient hold.

Name: Micron
Rationale: HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) is inside every AI GPU. Micron closing the gap on SK Hynix in HBM3E. When HBM ramp hits full stride, earnings surprise violently to upside. 40-year company, cyclical but structurally re-rated by AI.

Name: Super Micro Computer
Rationale: Speculative recovery. Best AI server assembler by speed-to-market. Accounting overhang lifting slowly. Small position only — governance risk real. Binary: clean audit = re-rate, new issue = pain.
